transactions.desc: McDermott was optioned to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday.
Hernandez signed a contract with the Dodgers on Monday.
Castano was optioned to Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday, Patrick Saunders of The Denver Post reports.
Agnos was recalled from Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday, Patrick Saunders of The Denver Post reports.
Fulford was recalled from Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday, Patrick Saunders of The Denver Post reports.
The Orioles optioned Handley to Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Orioles activated Holliday (hand) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Rangers recalled Helman from Triple-A Round Rock on Monday.
The Astros designated Bolton for assignment Monday.
The Astros recalled Alexander from Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday.
Atlanta activated Acuna (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Mariners selected Davis' contract from Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Mariners optioned Rivas to Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Mariners optioned Gonzalez to Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Mariners activated Wisdom (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Mariners recalled Ortiz from Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Astros reinstated Pena (hamstring/neck) from the 10-day injured list Monday, and he'll start at shortstop and bat leadoff in Houston's series opener in Minnesota.
The Rays recalled Solesky from Triple-A Durham on Monday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Rays activated Boyle (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Monday and optioned him to Triple-A Durham.
The Yankees selected Cruz's contract from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Monday.
The Yankees optioned Rodriguez to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Monday.
The Guardians optioned Heuer to Triple-A Columbus on Wednesday.
The Guardians reinstated Armstrong (groin) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
The Royals recalled Morgan from Triple-A Omaha on Monday.
The Phillies recalled Kemp from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Monday.
The Phillies optioned Reyes to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Monday, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.
The Orioles claimed Siani off waivers from the Dodgers on Monday, Matt Weyrich of The Baltimore Sun reports.
The Orioles designated Espada for assignment Monday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Mets optioned Gerber to Triple-A Syracuse on Monday.
The Mets selected Duarte's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Monday, Anthony DiComo of MLB.com reports.
